record.field:
Contemporary Heritage Living

Located at Rue de Neupré 108 in the scenic Osivies area, the Ferme Saint-Jean collection offers four unique apartment options (Units 26–29) that combine modern interior design with the charm of a historic estate. These units are ideal for professionals or small families seeking a quiet, stylish retreat without sacrificing accessibility.

Key Highlights:

  • Designer Interiors: Each unit features unique, modern furniture packages and high-quality flooring.

  • Versatile Layouts: From cozy 1-bedroom setups to more expansive open-plan living areas.

  • Peaceful Setting: Set within the quiet, green surroundings of a beautifully repurposed farmhouse.

Contemporary Heritage Living

Located at Rue de Neupré 108 in the scenic Osivies area, the Ferme Saint-Jean collection offers four unique apartment options (Units 26–29) that combine modern interior design with the charm of a historic estate. These units are ideal for professionals or small families seeking a quiet, stylish retreat without sacrificing accessibility.

Key Highlights:

  • Designer Interiors: Each unit features unique, modern furniture packages and high-quality flooring.

  • Versatile Layouts: From cozy 1-bedroom setups to more expansive open-plan living areas.

  • Peaceful Setting: Set within the quiet, green surroundings of a beautifully repurposed farmhouse.

Contemporary Heritage Living

Located at Rue de Neupré 108 in the scenic Osivies area, the Ferme Saint-Jean collection offers four unique apartment options (Units 26–29) that combine modern interior design with the charm of a historic estate. These units are ideal for professionals or small families seeking a quiet, stylish retreat without sacrificing accessibility.

Key Highlights:

  • Designer Interiors: Each unit features unique, modern furniture packages and high-quality flooring.

  • Versatile Layouts: From cozy 1-bedroom setups to more expansive open-plan living areas.

  • Peaceful Setting: Set within the quiet, green surroundings of a beautifully repurposed farmhouse.

Contemporary Heritage Living

Located at Rue de Neupré 108 in the scenic Osivies area, the Ferme Saint-Jean collection offers four unique apartment options (Units 26–29) that combine modern interior design with the charm of a historic estate. These units are ideal for professionals or small families seeking a quiet, stylish retreat without sacrificing accessibility.

Key Highlights:

  • Designer Interiors: Each unit features unique, modern furniture packages and high-quality flooring.

  • Versatile Layouts: From cozy 1-bedroom setups to more expansive open-plan living areas.

  • Peaceful Setting: Set within the quiet, green surroundings of a beautifully repurposed farmhouse.

The Future of Work in the Heart of Brussels

Elevate your business presence at Park Station, located at the strategic Rue de Bruxelles 119, 1083 Louise. This collection of contemporary office suites (Offices M, S, and T) offers a sophisticated, flexible environment designed for modern professionals who demand both style and functionality in the capital's most vibrant business district.

Key Highlights:

  • Diverse Space Options: Whether you need a collaborative hub (Office M), a focused executive suite (Office S), or a spacious flagship floor (Office T), we have the right fit for your team.

  • Modern Industrial Aesthetic: Features high ceilings, exposed ductwork, and abundant natural light to foster creativity and productivity.

  • Fully Equipped Amenities: Access to premium lounges, designer meeting rooms, and state-of-the-art infrastructure.

  • Elite Location: Situated in the prestigious Louise area, providing immediate access to world-class dining, high-end retail, and excellent transport links.

The Future of Work in the Heart of Brussels

Elevate your business presence at Park Station, located at the strategic Rue de Bruxelles 119, 1083 Louise. This collection of contemporary office suites (Offices M, S, and T) offers a sophisticated, flexible environment designed for modern professionals who demand both style and functionality in the capital's most vibrant business district.

Key Highlights:

  • Diverse Space Options: Whether you need a collaborative hub (Office M), a focused executive suite (Office S), or a spacious flagship floor (Office T), we have the right fit for your team.

  • Modern Industrial Aesthetic: Features high ceilings, exposed ductwork, and abundant natural light to foster creativity and productivity.

  • Fully Equipped Amenities: Access to premium lounges, designer meeting rooms, and state-of-the-art infrastructure.

  • Elite Location: Situated in the prestigious Louise area, providing immediate access to world-class dining, high-end retail, and excellent transport links.

The Future of Work in the Heart of Brussels

Elevate your business presence at Park Station, located at the strategic Rue de Bruxelles 119, 1083 Louise. This collection of contemporary office suites (Offices M, S, and T) offers a sophisticated, flexible environment designed for modern professionals who demand both style and functionality in the capital's most vibrant business district.

Key Highlights:

  • Diverse Space Options: Whether you need a collaborative hub (Office M), a focused executive suite (Office S), or a spacious flagship floor (Office T), we have the right fit for your team.

  • Modern Industrial Aesthetic: Features high ceilings, exposed ductwork, and abundant natural light to foster creativity and productivity.

  • Fully Equipped Amenities: Access to premium lounges, designer meeting rooms, and state-of-the-art infrastructure.

  • Elite Location: Situated in the prestigious Louise area, providing immediate access to world-class dining, high-end retail, and excellent transport links.

Sky-High Sophistication in Uccle

Experience unparalleled urban living in the heart of Uccle. This Observatoire Duplex in the exclusive Bellevue building offers breathtaking city views and high-end finishes. Located at the coveted Avenue du Chateau 123, this residence is designed for those who appreciate architectural elegance and a vibrant neighborhood atmosphere.

Key Highlights:

  • Breathtaking Views: Wide-angle vistas of the Uccle skyline from your private balcony.

  • Architectural Excellence: A modern duplex layout that maximizes both privacy and social space.

  • Prime Location: Situated in one of Brussels' most sought-after residential districts.
